message:
fix(parser,mvcc): add expression recursion depth limit and optimize bloom hash

Parser (expr.rs, parser.rs):
- Add MAX_PARSE_DEPTH (1000) recursion limit to the Pratt expression
  parser. Deeply nested expressions (e.g., from malicious or generated
  SQL) previously caused stack overflow. The enter_recursion /
  leave_recursion guards on parse_expr_bp emit a clear ParseError
  instead of crashing.
- Refactor parse_expr_bp into a thin wrapper that tracks depth and an
  inner parse_expr_bp_inner that contains the actual parsing logic.

MVCC bloom filter (cache_aligned.rs):
- Replace per-call Vec allocation in bloom_hash with a fixed-size
  stack buffer. The domain prefix, page number, and probe index are
  always small enough to fit in a 32-byte array, eliminating a heap
  allocation on every bloom filter probe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
